name: Output.Ledc → Set Frequency
description: This [Action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) allows you to manually change the frequency of an LEDC channel at runtime. Use cases include controlling a passive buzzer (for pitch control).

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the LEDC output to change.

config_entries.label: Frequency
config_entries.description: The frequency to set in Hz.
